data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any checks or reads that confirm the behavior of upgrade/downgrade and prorated transitions. While the linked use case mentions the need for this behavior, there are no prior steps that validate it, leading to a clear gap in the evidence. Specifically, the absence of any evidence related to the actual implementation or testing of the upgrade/downgrade functionality indicates that this requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add tests for upgrade/downgrade behavior
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that upgrading a membership tier correctly applies prorated charges.
